name: Rolled Oats Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, sugar, and salt.
2. Add to the oats and milk mixture until combined.
3. Stir in the butter, water, and eggs until thoroughly mixed.
4. Heat a griddle or skillet over medium heat.
5. Pour batter onto the hot surface using a 1/4 cup measure.
6. Cook until bubbles form on the surface of the cakes, about 2-3 minutes per side.
7. Remove from heat and serve warm.
